doctor.translate: доктор, врач, эскулап, шабер, скребок, лечить, фальсифицировать, подделывать

examples.eng: You want to see a doctor.
My head reels, doctor.
Let me by, I'm a doctor.
The doctor will see you now.
The doctor must see him at once.
The doctor is off-duty today.
Next the doctor examined his back.
I want him to be a doctor.
examples.ru: Я хочу, чтобы он стал врачом.

examples.eng: The doctor will soon be here.
I switched to a new doctor.
My other sister is a doctor.
examples.ru: Ещё одна моя сестра работает врачом.

examples.eng: The doctor put her on Prozac.
My younger brother is a doctor.
Angelic Doctor
The doctor was led above.
She is not my usual doctor.
examples.ru: Она не является моим лечащим врачом.

examples.eng: The doctor gave me a checkup.
Quick! Go and fetch a doctor.
a doctored photo of the actress
She visits her doctor regularly.
I think we should call a doctor.
If in doubt, consult your doctor.
examples.ru: Если сомневаетесь, проконсультируйтесь с вашим врачом.

examples.eng: Let me through — I'm a doctor.
examples.ru: Пропустите меня, я врач. / Дайте мне пройти, я доктор.

examples.eng: She's training to be a doctor.
examples.ru: Она учится на врача. / Она готовится стать врачом.

examples.eng: Karen asked to see the doctor.
The doctor manipulated my back.
“Doctor” is a two-syllable word.
The doctor treated my broken leg.
examples.ru: Этот доктор лечил мою сломанную ногу.

examples.eng: He had time to doctor his wounds.
examples.ru: У него было время, чтобы залечить раны.

examples.eng: The doctor prescribed a laxative.
